die Krankenversorgung.en: provision / care (versorgen – to provide care for)

einwilligen.en: verb suffix: to act on something

erwähnen.en: to think / suppose / have in mind (archaic root)

delegieren.en: from Latin delegare: to send away / commission (same root as English 'delegate')
German verb suffix for loanwords (like organisieren, telefonieren)

waagerecht.en: scales / balance (the weighing instrument — perfectly level when balanced)

gegenteilig.en: adjective suffix (like in richtig = correct, fertig = ready)

genehmigen.en: verb-forming suffix: to make (like reinigen = to clean, festigen = to strengthen)

gelegentlich.en: opportune / convenient (same root as Gelegenheit – opportunity)

gemütlich.en: spirit / inner mood / soul (the warm emotional inner life)

abhaken.en: hook → checkmark / tick (a checkmark looks like a hook)

der Unterschied.en: separation (from scheiden – to separate / to part)

die Gelegenheit.en: situated / convenient / opportune (past participle of liegen – to lie/be located)

sich beeilen.en: verbal prefix: applying an action thoroughly

einfügen.en: to join / fit (fügen = to fit pieces together)

der Abfalleimer.en: fall (fallen = to fall) → waste that falls away

zuständig.en: from stehen = to stand (der Stand = standing position)

der Gedanke.en: prefix: turns verb into noun (result of action)

erklären.en: prefix: to completion/to a new state

betrügen.en: to deceive / to be false (related to Trug = deception)

vermissen.en: to lack / to be without (related to English 'miss')

erkennen.en: prefix: to completion/to a new state

erzählen.en: prefix: to completion/to a new state

scannen.en: suffix indicating the action of doing something

bewältigen.en: from walten (to rule / hold power over), related to Gewalt (power/force)

erschöpfen.en: from schöpfen (to scoop / draw out water)

erschüttern.en: root from schütten (to pour / shake out)

erhalten.en: prefix: to completion/to a new state

erleben.en: prefix: to completion/to a new state

erreichen.en: prefix: to completion/to a new state

nachahmen.en: to mimic (related to Affe = ape, as apes imitate)

ankündigen.en: separable prefix: toward / indicating a forthcoming action
to give notice / terminate (a job or contract)

befehlen.en: archaic: to hand over / entrust (unrelated to modern fehlen = to be missing)

erstellen.en: prefix: to completion/to a new state

vorbeigehen.en: past / by (vorbei = over and done, gone past)

ansagen.en: separable prefix: toward / calling attention to something

scheitern.en: verb suffix (to break apart like split wood)

erbitten.en: prefix indicating a formal or polite request

erfassen.en: prefix: to completion/to a new state

ergreifen.en: prefix: to completion/to a new state

die Malerin.en: feminine noun ending for a female person/profession

die Geschwindigkeit.en: swift/to vanish (root: schwindeln = to speed away)

die Urkunde.en: knowledge / announcement (from old German kund = known/proclaimed)

vernünftig.en: adjective suffix: having the quality of

entwöhnen.en: prefix: removal / undoing (cf. entfernen = to remove)

verlieren.en: prefix: loss / going away (cf. vergessen, verirren)

beleidigen.en: suffering / offense (cf. es tut mir leid = I'm sorry)

sich erkundigen.en: prefix: achieving / gaining through a process

leider.en: suffix indicating a state or condition

buchstäblich.en: staff / stave (letters were carved on wooden sticks) → Buchstabe = letter of the alphabet
suffix: in the manner of / -like (a→ä umlaut shift in the stem)

gefährlich.en: prefix indicating a state or result

erfahren.en: prefix: achieving / gaining through a process

gegebenenfalls.en: in case of (→ if applicable/where necessary)

zurückkehren.en: to turn / sweep → here: to turn back

berücksichtigen.en: verb suffix: to take into account

die Notwendigkeit.en: noun suffix (-ness): turns adjective into abstract noun

die Klassenarbeit.en: work / task → written test done in class

der Bundesrat.en: federal / of the federation (from Bund – union/federation)
